module_map.responsibility: File metadata extraction and representation. Core struct Meta holds all file attributes collected from filesystem.
key_types: Meta (main struct: name, path, date, owner, size, permissions, file_type, symlink, inode, links, git_status, content)

module_map.responsibility: CLI argument parsing and user preferences. Controls behavior of all other modules.
key_types: Block (enum: Permission, User, Group, Size, Date, Name, INode, Links, etc.)

module_map.responsibility: Rendering logic: transforms Meta + Flags into terminal output. Grid layout, tree layout, padding calculation.
Orchestration: fetch → sort → display pipeline. Orchestrates Meta collection, sorting, and output rendering.
key_types: Core (holds Flags, Icons, Colors, GitTheme, sorters)

module_map.responsibility: Sorting logic: comparators for Meta based on SortColumn, SortOrder, DirGrouping.
Theme configuration: colors, icons, git symbols from config files.
Color application: maps theme colors to Elem types and applies ANSI coloring.
key_types: Elem (enum: Filename, Permission, Size, Date, User, etc.)

module_map.responsibility: Icon resolution: selects icon from theme based on file name/type/extension.
Git repository analysis: caches git status per path, provides status symbols.

data_flow.description: Calls fs::symlink_metadata(), then fs::metadata(). Constructs Name via Name::new(). Extracts INode, Links, Size, Date, Owner, Permissions, AccessControl from std metadata. Returns Meta struct with all fields populated (except git_status, content).
types_produced: Meta { name, path, date, owner, size, permissions_or_attributes, file_type, symlink, inode, links, access_control, git_status: None, content: None }

data_flow.description: If file is directory and depth > 0: reads dir entries, recursively calls Meta::from_path for each entry, populates Meta.content field with child Meta structs.
Optional: queries git repository for file status (modified, staged, etc.). Populates Meta.git_status field.
Core::sort() applies Vec of (SortOrder, SortFn) to Meta vector. Comparators extract key from Meta (e.g., Meta.size, Meta.date, Meta.name) and compare. Handles DirGrouping rules.
During display: icon.rs queries IconTheme to find icon for (file extension, file_type). Looks up in theme/icon.rs config. Returns icon string.
During display: color.rs maps Elem type (Permission, Size, Date, etc.) to ColorTheme color. Applies ANSI escape codes via ColoredString.

Iterates Meta vector. For each Meta, calls get_output() which matches on Block type (Permission, User, Group, Size, Date, Name, etc.). Each block calls .render(colors) on the Meta field. Builds Vec<String> of display strings. grid-rs assembles into table. Returns String.

cross_module_hubs.reason: Central data structure. Consumed by core, display, sort, git, icon, color modules. Imports: flags, git. Exports Meta struct used everywhere.
Configuration hub. Controls behavior of meta, display, sort, core, icon, color, theme modules. Every decision branches on Flags. Imports: config_file. Exports Flags struct.
cross_module_hubs.note: Block enum is critical dependency for display rendering

cross_module_hubs.reason: Rendering hub. Depends on meta (Meta struct), flags (Flags), color (Colors), icon (Icons), git_theme (GitTheme), sort (SortFn). Used only by core.rs.

change_proposal.objective: Add SHA-256 checksum display column to file listings.
files_to_modify: src/meta/mod.rs (add pub checksum field to Meta struct, populate in from_path)
src/flags/blocks.rs (add Checksum variant to Block enum, add get_header case)
src/display.rs (add Checksum case to get_output match statement, add render call)
src/sort.rs (add SortColumn::Checksum variant, add comparator function)
new_types: CheckSum struct: { value: String (hex SHA-256), truncated: Option<String> (first N chars for display) }
change_proposal.pattern_to_follow: Follow meta/size.rs pattern: struct with render(colors: &Colors) -> ColoredString method. Store raw data, format on render. size.rs: extracts u64 from metadata.len(), formats with unit scaling (B/KB/MB/GB) based on SizeOption. Similarly: extract file hash on from_path (compute SHA-256 via sha2 crate), format on render (full or truncated hex based on user flag).
change_proposal.integration_point: Core flow: 1) Meta::from_path() computes CheckSum::from_file(path) [read file, sha2::Sha256::digest()]. 2) Flags::blocks.0 can include Block::Checksum. 3) display.rs::get_output() matches Block::Checksum => block_vec.push(meta.checksum.render(colors)). 4) sort.rs comparators handle SortColumn::Checksum by comparing checksum hex values. 5) Rendered as colored string (e.g., color by Elem::Size or new Elem::Checksum).
implementation_details: Implement From<&std::fs::Metadata> for CheckSum (or separate compute function)
Add pub checksum: Option<CheckSum> to Meta struct
In Meta::from_path, after size extraction: checksum = Some(CheckSum::from_file(path))
Handle errors: wrap in Ok/Err, return None on permission denied
Add Block::Checksum pattern to blocks.rs (follows Block::Size, Block::Links pattern)
In display.rs, add: Block::Checksum => block_vec.push(match &meta.checksum { Some(cs) => cs.render(colors), None => colorize_missing("?") })
Rendering: CheckSum::render(colors) returns ColoredString with colors.colorize(hex_string, &Elem::Size)
risks: Performance: SHA-256 computation on every file. Mitigate: cache per path, skip large files option, make optional via flag (--blocks=checksum)
Large files: hash computation can be slow. Mitigate: add --checksum-max-size flag (default 100MB), skip hashing large files
Permission denied: some files unreadable. Mitigate: return None, display "?" like other optional fields
Column width: SHA-256 hex (64 chars) wide. Mitigate: add --checksum-truncate flag (show first 8 or 16 chars), handle padding in display.rs
Integration with recursive display: child Meta checksums computed in recurse_into(). Should work: each Meta has its own checksum field, independently populated
Sorting stability: if two files have same checksum hash, sort by name (secondary key). Already handled by sort.rs multi-key pattern

tool_usage.result: Top-level directory structure: 12 root files (core.rs, display.rs, flags.rs, sort.rs, color.rs, icon.rs, git.rs, theme.rs, main.rs, app.rs, config_file.rs, git_theme.rs), 3 submodules (flags/, meta/, theme/)
Meta struct (45-60), from_path (261-367), recurse_into (63-190). Imports: 34 external modules. Exports: Meta, Name, Size, Date, Owner, etc. via pub use.
Core struct (23-29), new (32-95), run (97-103), fetch (105-168), sort (170-178), display (180-200). Orchestrates pipeline.
grid (18-39), tree (41-79), inner_display_grid (82-198), get_output (325-431). Imports: 39 external modules. Integrates Meta + Flags + Colors + Icons.
Name struct (19-24), new (27-43), render (143-189). Imports: 37 modules. Integrates with Colors and Icons for rendering.
Blocks struct (13), Block enum (186-198). Block variants: INode, Links, Permission, User, Group, Context, Size, Date, Name. get_header per block. Extensible for Checksum.
Identified cross-module imports. Meta/Flags/Display are central hubs.
from_path implementation: metadata extraction, Name construction, INode/Links/Size/Date/Owner/Permissions/AccessControl extraction.
get_output implementation: match on Block type, call .render(colors) on meta fields, build Vec<String>.
